name: Fisetin and BCL-XL inhibitor senolytic discovery study
summary: In vitro candidate-senolytic study testing fisetin and selective BCL-XL inhibitors across senescent human cell types, with translation context around cell-type specificity and hematologic toxicity concerns for broader BCL-2 family inhibition.
model_system: Senescent human umbilical vein endothelial cells, IMR90 lung fibroblasts, and primary human preadipocytes.
